questions.q: What is the primary reason cited by Google for the removal of Doki Doki Literature Club from the Play Store?
questions.correctText: Google stated that the game's content violates their Terms of Service in its depiction of sensitive themes.

questions.q: Which of the following is NOT among the new features being added to Crimson Desert in upcoming updates?
options: New Skills for Damiane and Oongka
questions.correctText: While Crimson Desert is receiving updates like Boss Rematches, new skills, and difficulty settings, player housing customization has not been announced as part of these upcoming features.

questions.q: What is the stance of Phantom Blade Zero's developer, S-Game, regarding generative AI in game development?
options: They are fully embracing generative AI for all aspects of development.
They are selectively using generative AI for background assets only.
They are rejecting generative AI, emphasizing that all content is crafted by human artists.
They are currently experimenting with generative AI but have not made a final decision.
questions.correctText: S-Game has explicitly stated that they are rejecting generative AI, emphasizing that every piece of content in Phantom Blade Zero has been crafted by human artists.

questions.q: Which Denuvo-protected game released in 2026 was reportedly the first to be fully cracked by pirates?
questions.correctText: Resident Evil Requiem, a title released in 2026, has been reported as the first Denuvo-protected game of that year to be fully cracked by pirates.

questions.q: The developers of which popular Minecraft mod have been hired by Hytale to work on new mechanics?
questions.correctText: The creators of the popular Minecraft mod 'Create' have been hired by Hytale to work on developing new mechanics for the game.
